Title: Persian Hospitality Constellation
Body (HTML): This original collection of Persian fruit paintings is a radiant ode to nature’s geometry and the poetry of everyday ritual. Hand-painted in richly layered inks and sealed in luminous resin, each piece captures the intimate detail of sliced fruit : the jeweled seeds of pomegranate, the glowing translucence of citrus, the vibrant heart of kiwi suspended in a moment of eternal ripeness.Sold as a complete group, these four circular works are designed to live together as a constellation. Their forms echo traditional Persian hospitality. Fruit laid out generously, symbolising welcome, prosperity, and life’s sweetness shared. When arranged on the wall, they create a harmonious dialogue of colour and movement: deep ruby and garnet tones grounded by vivid greens and sunlit orange.The high-gloss resin finish enhances the depth of each brushstroke, creating a glass-like surface that catches the light beautifully throughout the day. The result is both earthy and refined — bohemian in spirit, yet undeniably elevated.Details:• Original artworks (not prints)• Created with professional ink and finished in clear resin• Circular panels• Sold as a complete four-piece set• Ready to hangPerfect for dining spaces, kitchens, creative studios, or any home that honours beauty, warmth, and story.These pieces are more than decorative — they are an offering. A reminder of abundance. A gathering of colour. A small feast for the walls.

Title: Natures Legacy
Body (HTML): Women as Earth, Spirit as Life This is the one-of-a-kind, original artwork “Legacy of Nature” — created with ink and resin on fine art panel. In this piece, the feminine figure rises from flowing waters, crowned by planets and the radiant sun. She is not apart from the world, but the living pulse of it — the oceans, the skies, the fire of stars, and the bloom of life itself. The artwork reflects the truth that women and nature are not separate. To honor women is to honor Earth itself. To speak of “Mother Nature” is not to point outward, but inward — to the life force within us all. This is more than a painting — it is a living emblem of feminine strength, natural beauty, and cosmic connection. Details Title: Dreamscape Medium: Archival inks with resin finish Surface: Fine art panel (plastic composite board, museum-grade) Dimensions: 24 x 48 inches (61 x 122 cm) Finish: Gloss-like depth that amplifies color vibrancy Signature: Hand-signed by the artist Free International Shipping 🌟 Display Options Painting Only: Original artwork on fine art panel, ready to display or custom-frame as desired. Light Box Edition: Professionally framed and transformed into a luminous art light fixture. Golden LED light is installed behind the piece, so the resin and ink glow with warmth, radiance, and depth. Creates a stunning ambient centerpiece that shifts the atmosphere of your room. Why It’s Special A large-format statement piece designed to transform a space Complex layering of color, pattern, and detail that changes with the light Resin finish adds luxury, durability, and a contemporary feel Perfect for collectors of mystical, symbolic, and globally inspired fine art Option to elevate it into a radiant light box installation — both painting and light in one Shipping & Care Ships carefully crated for protection Free International Shipping Fully insured shipping included for peace of mind For longevity, avoid direct prolonged sunlight and high humidity Artist’s Note I am Caroline — an artist, mother, and world traveler currently living in Iran. My work is an exploration of color, culture, and spirit — a way of making life itself into art. This painting is both a personal vision and an invitation: to see the world not only as it is, but as it could be, shimmering with mystery and beauty. Own the original. Bring the magic of Natures Legacy into your home.

Title: Sacred Message
Body (HTML): Bring a touch of soulful beauty into your home with this earthy, bohemian original art piece. Featuring a woman cloaked in deep, flowing blues, surrounded by warm terracotta hues and kissed by the glow of a setting sun, this piece evokes femininity, mystery, and grounded strength. The soft textures and natural palette make it a perfect statement piece for any space that celebrates creativity, ritual, and flow. Hand painted on museum-quality matte paper with watercolor, this artwork carries a timeless, tactile feel—beautifully complementing both minimalist interiors and eclectic, layered spaces. Whether placed in a cozy reading nook, sunlit studio, or as part of a gallery wall, it adds warmth and presence to any room.This print makes a thoughtful gift for lovers of bohemian interiors, soulful art, and feminine symbolism. ✨ Details• Original handmade watercolor painting on premium museum-quality matte paper• Frame not included *20x28 inches Infuse your home with art that feels alive—rooted in earth tones, feminine strength, and the gentle mystery of the in-between.

Title: Water Goddess
Body (HTML):
Step into an underwater dreamscape with this enchanting fine art handmade original watercolor, a celebration of the feminine spirit flowing freely between worlds. The painting portrays a goddess-like woman draped in deep magenta, her star-flecked hair drifting like constellations beneath the sea. Surrounding her are playful cherub-like nymphs and golden fish, weaving ribbons through water and light. Every detail—bubbles rising, shimmering currents, celestial strands—captures the balance of grace, movement, and mystery. Painted on museum-quality watercolor paper, this piece is both luminous and grounding, perfect for anyone who wishes to invite beauty, fluidity, and divine feminine energy into their space. ✨ Details:
• High-quality original watercolor art piece
• Rich, lasting color with varnish
• Vertical orientation
• Frame not included This artwork makes a powerful statement piece for meditation rooms, bedrooms, or sacred spaces, and a meaningful gift for lovers of goddess imagery, mystical art, and bohemian home décor.
